achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.pageSubtitle: Milestones you reach as your loyalty program grows.

ladders.stamps: {count, plural, =1 {First stamp given} other {# stamps given}}
ladders.repeatCustomers: {count, plural, =1 {First returning customer} other {# returning customers}}

info.growth: Total customers who have added your card, all time.
info.engagement: Total stamps your team has given, all time.
info.momentum: Your last 30 days, a rolling window. It rewards a strong recent month and keeps moving as the days roll by.
info.loyalty: Customers who keep coming back, counted once they have visited on two different days.
info.firsts: One-time milestones you reach the first time you do something.
info.weeklyGoal: Stamps your team gives this week. We suggest a target from your recent weeks, and you can change it anytime.

weeklyGoal.label: This week's goal
weeklyGoal.toGo: {remaining} stamps to go, you've got this.
weeklyGoal.editDescription: The number of stamps you want to reach this week. We suggest {auto}, based on your recent weeks.
